Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows mild renal impairment (elevated creatinine), hypoglycemia (low glucose and HbA1c), and significant proteinuria with abnormal urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, bilirubin, ketones, protein). These suggest possible underlying renal pathology and/or urinary tract disorder. No evidence of infection (negative nitrites/leukocytes). Recommend clinical correlation for renal and metabolic status, and further nephrological/urological evaluation.
